issues.claim: Analog not reconstructible from chapter alone
issues.objection: Removed-verse test for 7.30: if 7.30 were removed from the source pack, the chapter alone would not produce this specific engineering analog. The analog depends on the verse's specific structural claim (thread 3 (knowing-at-departure-of-mind; STRETCHED; chapter closes)), which is not stated equivalently elsewhere in the chapter. Tags (long-term-thinking, first-principles, operator-system-coupling) anchor on this verse's specific claim. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Chapter-closing verse. Heavy metaphysics: adhibhūta/adhidaiva/adhiyajña + prayāṇa-kāla. Forward-pointer to Ch 8 honored explicitly. Engineering analog scoped at career-end-departure substrate-articulation. Counter-example: performative all-hands talk that does not survive the team's actual problems is the failure mode.

notes: Removed-verse test for 7.30: analog is anchored on this verse's specific structural claim, not on chapter-level material alone. PASS.
